questions.prompt: Tom is my friend. I like ____.
questions.explanation: 空格在動詞 like 後面，是受詞位置；Tom 是男生，所以用受格 him。

questions.prompt: Lisa is kind. We know ____.
questions.explanation: know 後面要接受格；Lisa 是女生，所以用 her。

questions.prompt: This is my dog. I love ____.
questions.explanation: love 後面是受詞；my dog 是單數動物，所以用 it。

questions.prompt: Jack and I are here. Please help ____.
questions.explanation: help 後面要用受格；Jack and I 包含我，所以用 us。

questions.prompt: Amy and Ben are late. Wait for ____.
questions.explanation: for 是介系詞，後面要用受格；Amy and Ben 是複數，所以用 them。

questions.prompt: My mother is busy. I can help ____.
questions.explanation: help 後面是受詞；my mother 是女生，所以用 her。

questions.prompt: My father is in the car. I can see ____.
questions.explanation: see 後面要用受格；my father 是男生，所以用 him。

questions.prompt: The students are noisy. The teacher talks to ____.
questions.explanation: to 是介系詞，後面要用受格；the students 是複數，所以用 them。

questions.prompt: The book is interesting. I read ____ every night.
questions.explanation: read 後面是受詞；the book 是單數物品，所以用 it。

questions.prompt: You are my friend. I trust ____.
questions.explanation: You 的主格和受格都是 you；trust 後面要用受格 you。

questions.prompt: Mary and I need help. Can you help ____?
questions.explanation: help 後面要用受格；Mary and I 包含我，所以用 us。

questions.prompt: Peter has a bike. I ride with ____.
questions.explanation: with 是介系詞，後面要用受格；Peter 是男生，所以用 him。

questions.prompt: The cat is cute. I feed ____ every morning.
questions.explanation: feed 後面是受詞；the cat 是單數動物，所以用 it。

questions.prompt: Anna is at school. I sit next to ____.
questions.explanation: to 是介系詞，後面要用受格；Anna 是女生，所以用 her。

questions.prompt: My friends are coming. I will call ____.
questions.explanation: call 後面是受詞；my friends 是複數，所以用 them。

questions.prompt: I am here. Please listen to ____.
questions.explanation: to 是介系詞，後面要用受格；I 的受格是 me。

questions.prompt: Kevin and Sam are on the team. We cheer for ____.
questions.explanation: for 是介系詞，後面接受格；Kevin and Sam 是複數，所以用 them。

questions.prompt: This pencil is mine. Do not lose ____.
questions.explanation: lose 後面是受詞；this pencil 是單數物品，所以用 it。

questions.prompt: Jenny is my cousin. I visit ____ on Sunday.
questions.explanation: visit 後面是受詞；Jenny 是女生，所以用 her。

questions.prompt: My uncle is a doctor. I often see ____.
questions.explanation: see 後面要用受格；my uncle 是男生，所以用 him。

questions.prompt: The girls are singing. Listen to ____.
questions.explanation: to 是介系詞，後面用受格；the girls 是複數，所以用 them。

questions.prompt: The boys are in the yard. Dad watches ____.
questions.explanation: watches 後面是受詞；the boys 是複數，所以用 them。

questions.prompt: My grandma is cooking. I stand beside ____.
questions.explanation: beside 是介系詞，後面要用受格；grandma 是女生，所以用 her。

questions.prompt: My grandpa tells stories. I like ____.
questions.explanation: like 後面是受詞；grandpa 是男生，所以用 him。

questions.prompt: The bird is hungry. Please feed ____.
questions.explanation: feed 後面是受詞；the bird 是單數動物，所以用 it。

questions.prompt: You are late. We are waiting for ____.
questions.explanation: for 後面要用受格；you 的受格仍是 you。

questions.prompt: My sister and I need a pencil. Can you give ____ one?
questions.explanation: give 後面的人要用受格；My sister and I 包含我，所以用 us。

questions.prompt: The teacher is kind. The students like ____.
questions.explanation: like 後面是受詞；這裡指女老師，所以用 her。

questions.prompt: Mr. Lin is my teacher. I talk to ____ after class.
questions.explanation: to 是介系詞，後面用受格；Mr. Lin 是男生，所以用 him。

questions.prompt: The windows are dirty. Please clean ____.
questions.explanation: clean 後面是受詞；the windows 是複數，所以用 them。

questions.prompt: The baby is crying. Mom hugs ____.
questions.explanation: hugs 後面是受詞；不知道 baby 性別時，可用 it。

questions.prompt: David is from Canada. We like ____.
questions.explanation: like 後面是受詞；David 是男生，所以用 him。

questions.prompt: Helen has two cats. I know ____ well.
questions.explanation: know 後面要用受格；Helen 是女生，所以用 her。

questions.prompt: The chairs are heavy. We move ____.
questions.explanation: move 後面是受詞；the chairs 是複數，所以用 them。

questions.prompt: My brother and my sister are outside. I can see ____.
questions.explanation: see 後面是受詞；兩個人以上要用 them。

questions.prompt: Mom and Dad are busy. I help ____.
questions.explanation: help 後面要用受格；Mom and Dad 是複數，所以用 them。

questions.prompt: The computer is old. Dad fixes ____.
questions.explanation: fixes 後面是受詞；the computer 是單數物品，所以用 it。

questions.prompt: Grace and Tina are friendly. I play with ____.
questions.explanation: with 是介系詞，後面用受格；Grace and Tina 是複數，所以用 them。

questions.prompt: My family and I are hungry. Grandma cooks for ____.
questions.explanation: for 是介系詞，後面用受格；My family and I 包含我，所以用 us。

questions.prompt: The cake is delicious. We eat ____.
questions.explanation: eat 後面是受詞；the cake 是單數物品，所以用 it。

questions.prompt: My classmates and I are ready. The teacher calls ____.
questions.explanation: calls 後面是受詞；My classmates and I 包含我，所以用 us。

questions.prompt: The fish are in the tank. I feed ____.
questions.explanation: feed 後面是受詞；the fish 這裡是複數，所以用 them。

questions.prompt: Nina is reading. Please do not bother ____.
questions.explanation: bother 後面是受詞；Nina 是女生，所以用 her。

questions.prompt: Leo is washing dishes. Mom thanks ____.
questions.explanation: thanks 後面是受詞；Leo 是男生，所以用 him。

questions.prompt: The flowers are pretty. I look at ____.
questions.explanation: at 是介系詞，後面用受格；the flowers 是複數，所以用 them。

questions.prompt: My aunt is coming. We wait for ____.
questions.explanation: for 後面要用受格；my aunt 是女生，所以用 her。

questions.prompt: My cousin Ken is funny. Everyone likes ____.
questions.explanation: likes 後面是受詞；Ken 是男生，所以用 him。

questions.prompt: The door is closed. Please open ____.
questions.explanation: open 後面是受詞；the door 是單數物品，所以用 it。

questions.prompt: Rita and I are on the team. Coach trains ____.
questions.explanation: trains 後面是受詞；Rita and I 包含我，所以用 us。

questions.prompt: The children are excited. The clown makes ____ laugh.
questions.explanation: makes 後面的人是受詞；the children 是複數，所以用 them。
